name: Princess Belle Sidekick Chip Kids' Pillow Buddy - The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™
description: This Princess Belle Sidekick Chip Kids' Pillow Buddy from The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™ makes a fun pick for your young Disney fan. This pillow buddy doll is made from recycled PET fabric and is designed as Chip the teacup from Beauty and the Beast for a fan-favorite look. Standing 16 inches high, it makes a fun pairing with Disney-themed sheets and pillowcases on their bed.
